items.title: Jauan Jennings: Inks deal with Minnesota
items.body_text: Jennings and the Vikings agreed on a one-year, $13 million contract Thursday, Adam Schefter of ESPN reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Kyle Pitts: Locked in for 2026
items.body_text: Pitts signed his franchise tender with the Falcons for the 2026 season Thursday, Tom Pelissero of NFL Network reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Drake Maye: Past his shoulder issue
items.body_text: With regard to the right shoulder issue he managed ahead of Super Bowl LX, Maye noted Wednesday that he's doing "great," ESPN.com reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Aaron Rodgers: Discussing new deal with Pittsburgh
items.body_text: Rodgers is set to meet with Steelers officials in Pittsburgh this weekend as he looks to reach agreement on a deal to return to the team in 2026, Ian Rapoport of NFL Network reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: C.J. Stroud: Shedding weight
items.body_text: Stroud improved his diet this offseason in an effort to lose weight, according to DJ Bien-Aime of ESPN.com. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.
